summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The artifact is not a dedupe cluster and names no canonical; hydrated non-security PRs were kept independent for normal review/proof handling, security-sensitive PRs were routed to central security handling, the already-closed PR was kept closed, and refs with unavailable live state were isolated as needs_human.
